reviews.comment:
Si estás acostumbrado a ir a Full y que todo esté bien. Este es una trampa!! Domingo por la tarde noche, la persona que nos atendió no estaba muy contenta de que entramos hablando que íbamos a comer algo. No nos miraba mientras nos atendía y básicamente nos indujo a pedir un plato (porque tardaban solo 7 minutos en prepararlo, lo cual fue una mentira) cuando queríamos comer hamburguesa y nos repetía una y otra vez que tardaba al menos 30 minutos la preparación de la misma. No te ilusiones con la milanesa napolitana. Es una hoja de calcar con pan rallado, una tempera de salsa de tomate y un queso que claramente no es para derretir. A eso súmale 3/4 papas que las aplastan contra la supuesta milanesa, así te queda un bodoque. Las papas estaban mal cocidas, cuando la partís es polvo de papa. Y te dan un pan, que tiene tan poco amor que la miga en el medio está congelada. Éramos tres personas, le pedimos aderezos para los tres platos y solo nos dieron dos, lo cual hicimos notar así que finalmente nos dieron el tercer aderezo. La coca riquísima.

(Translated by Google)
If you're used to going to Full and everything being fine, this place is a rip-off! Sunday afternoon/evening, the person who served us wasn't too happy that we came in talking about getting something to eat. She wouldn't look at us while serving and basically pressured us into ordering a dish (because they said it only took 7 minutes to prepare, which was a lie) when we wanted a burger. She kept repeating that it took at least 30 minutes to prepare. Don't get your hopes up about the "milanesa napolitana." It's a sheet of parchment paper with breadcrumbs, a thin layer of tomato sauce, and cheese that's clearly not meant to melt. Add to that three-quarters of a slab of potatoes crammed onto the supposed milanesa, leaving you with a lumpy mess. The potatoes were undercooked; when you cut into them, they're just potato dust. And they give you a bun that's so poorly made that the crumb in the middle is frozen solid. There were three of us, and we asked for dressings for all three dishes, but they only gave us two. We pointed this out, and they finally gave us the third dressing. The coca was delicious.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16461763455653012667/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tGWFVVMXdibTQwY214Q09Vc3hRbTQ1YW1sbFNHYxAB

I filled up with fuel, and when I paid with Modo, it gave me a YPF QR code. I asked for the other one, and they said they didn't have it. I didn't get the BNA+ promotion. I won't be returning as a customer.
